articles.title: Skullcandy’s bass-boosting Crusher headphones now come with Bose’s ANC
articles.description: Skullcandy announced a new version of its Crusher wireless headphones today featuring a few of Bose's audio technologies including its QuietControl ANC and head-tracking spatial audio. The Crusher headphone line differentiates itself from the competition through the use of both full-range and dedicated bass drivers in each ear cup to boost deeper frequencies. Skullcandy admits […]
articles.author: Andrew Liszewski
